title: FMT1 modifier mask uses bit-level discriminator, not simple rc < threshold — correct
description: The verify() FMT1 stripping uses (rc & 0x80) \!= 0 && (rc & 0xF000) == 0 rather than a simpler range check. The comment explains why: subject number 1 sets bit 8, so 'bit 8 clear' would incorrectly strip TPM_RC_SIGNATURE+param_1. A future contributor might simplify this to a range check or remove one condition — this would be wrong. The existing discriminator is the correct implementation of TCG TPM2 Part 2 §6.6.3.
